changes.old: a mean enlargement of his Piedmont
changes.new: a mean aggrandizement of his Piedmont
changes.reason: Edgren: ingrandimento = 'aggrandizement (enlargement)'; aggrandizement is the primary definition and more period-appropriate in a political context
